summary: Implemented localStorage persistence for user preferences. Created `useLocalStorage<T>` hook with JSON parse/stringify, optional validation, and safe fallback to defaults on errors. Created `preferences.ts` with validators for routes, tier arrays, and search queries. Wired App.tsx to persist/restore last route via `openhand:lastRoute`, and BrowseAllCards to persist/restore tier filters (`openhand:activeTiers`) and search query (`openhand:searchQuery`). All 373 tests pass including 42 new persistence tests.
